title: InventoryRecord
description: One passively-observed medical device inventory record. Emitted as a single line of JSONL by poc_agentic_passive_device_identification.py when --json is set.

hostname.description: Best-effort hostname, resolved in the priority order: DHCP Option 12 -> LLMNR self-claim -> SMB NTLMSSP MsvAvNbComputerName / AUTHENTICATE.workstation -> mDNS A/PTR. Null when no on-wire hostname signal is observed for the host.

ip_address.description: Observed source IP for the host (IPv4 or IPv6 string form).

mac_address.description: Layer-2 MAC address normalized to colon-separated uppercase hex.

vendor.description: Vendor as a cpedict canonical slug. Used as slot 3 (vendor) in the cpe:2.3 string when a CVE/CPE binding exists upstream. Null when no deterministic mapping is available. Enumeration is intentionally limited to vendors observed in the synthetic and Schoolcraft PCAPs.

product.description: Product as a cpedict canonical slug. Used as slot 4 (product) in the cpe:2.3 string. Null when no deterministic product fingerprint (DICOM ManufacturerModelName, DHCP VCI + PRL, WS-Discovery series code, etc.) is observed.

version.description: Firmware/software version as a free-form string when observed (e.g. DICOM (0018,1020) SoftwareVersions, mDNS TXT firmware key, NTLMSSP version block).

device_class.description: Enumerated device class. For DICOM-speaking hosts, takes the DICOM Modality value (0008,0060): CT, MR, US, CR, DX, MG, NM, PT. Otherwise one of the role enums (patient_monitor, clinical_workstation, workstation, server, pacs, firewall, dhcp_server). Null when no deterministic class can be assigned.

open_ports.description: Set of TCP/UDP ports inferred from passively observed traffic on this host.

confidence.description: Effective per-host confidence after triage + (optional) fusion. HIGH: 3+ independent protocol signals agree (or 2+ with a floor trigger and no contradiction). MEDIUM: 2 signals or 1 signal with floor trigger, or any contradiction. LOW: single signal with no floor trigger. Null reserved for skipped hosts that never reach the JSONL emit path.
